name: Crockpot Chicken Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. In the crockpot, combine chicken, water, salt, thyme, pepper, and parsley.
2. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours or until chicken is very well done.
3. Remove chicken and strain broth into a bowl. Remove meat from bones.
4. Cut chicken into slivers and set aside.
5. Add butter to the crockpot and turn on high. Melt butter, stir in flour.
6. Gradually pour in broth, then cream. Cook on high for 30 minutes until bubbly.
7. Stir in cooked chicken, mushrooms, and cooked spaghetti. Cover and cook on high for 15 minutes.
8. Sprinkle the top with Parmesan cheese. Note: Chicken and broth may be cooked ahead of serving and refrigerated. Then, about 1 hour before serving time, combine the remaining ingredients and complete.
